data.title: Sunway International Calls 2026 AGM, Seeks Fresh Share Issue Mandate
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Sunway International Holdings Limited ( (HK:0058) ) is now available.

Sunway International Holdings Limited has called its annual general meeting for 5 June 2026 in Hong Kong, with contingency arrangements for severe weather, to present the audited consolidated financial statements and directors’ and auditor’s reports for the year ended 31 December 2025. Shareholders will vote on the re-election of one executive director and one independent non-executive director, authorise the board to set directors’ pay, re-appoint the auditor, and grant the board a general mandate to issue up to 20 per cent of the company’s existing share capital, a move that could provide financing flexibility but also implies potential dilution for existing investors.

The proposed share issuance mandate, which excludes rights issues, share option exercises, scrip dividends and conversions under existing instruments, would run until the next annual meeting or earlier termination, aligning Sunway with common Hong Kong corporate governance practice. These resolutions collectively aim to refresh the company’s governance framework and capital management flexibility for the coming year, signalling a routine but important reset of board authority and capital-raising options that will shape how Sunway can respond to market opportunities and funding needs.

More about Sunway International Holdings Limited

Sunway International Holdings Limited is a Bermuda-incorporated company listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange under stock code 58. While the notice does not detail its business lines, the company operates within the broader Hong Kong-listed corporate sector and is governed by a board comprising executive and independent non-executive directors.

Average Trading Volume: 329,510

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: HK$159.8M

data.title: Getty Images to Fund Litigation Judgment After Appeal Denial
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Getty Images Holdings ( (GETY) ) is now available.

On October 27, 2023, a U.S. District Court in New York ruled in favor of Alta Partners and CRCM Institutional Master Fund on certain breach of contract claims related to Getty Images Holdings’ public warrants, awarding approximately $36.9 million to Alta and $51.0 million to CRCM plus pre-judgment interest, while ruling in favor of the company on other significant claims, including Alta’s claims on later-acquired warrants. The Second Circuit Court of Appeals affirmed this judgment in all respects on January 15, 2026, and after the appeals court denied Getty Images’ rehearing request on April 16, 2026, the company confirmed it had already recorded a litigation loss and maintained a reserve for the full amount and will partially draw on its existing revolving credit facility, via subsidiary Getty Images, Inc., to help fund payment of the judgment and interest.

The most recent analyst rating on (GETY) stock is a Buy with a $7.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Getty Images Holdings stock, see the GETY Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GETY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GETY is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak technicals (shares below key moving averages with negative MACD) and unstable profitability despite strong gross margins. Earnings-call takeaways are mixed: strong operating performance and licensing wins are offset by guidance showing lower 2026 EBITDA/revenue versus reported 2025 and by high debt/interest burden and free-cash-flow compression. Corporate events add uncertainty via NYSE compliance risk, partially balanced by progress on merger clearance.

To see Spark’s full report on GETY stock, click here.

More about Getty Images Holdings

Getty Images Holdings operates in the visual content and media licensing industry, providing stock photography, video, music, and related digital assets to businesses, media organizations, and creative professionals worldwide. The company focuses on supplying high-quality visual content for commercial, editorial, and digital marketing uses across global markets.

Average Trading Volume: 2,888,252

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $387M

Learn more about GETY stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: OraSure, Altai Capital Reach Governance Cooperation Agreement
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Orasure Technologies ( (OSUR) ) is now available.

On April 16, 2026, OraSure Technologies announced a cooperation agreement with activist investor Altai Capital, under which Altai withdrew prior director nominations and stockholder proposals and agreed to customary standstill and voting provisions through March 31, 2027. As part of the deal, OraSure appointed healthcare technology executive John D. Bertrand as an independent Class II director, added him to its Nominating and Corporate Governance Committee and committed to include him on its 2026 director slate, while capping board size at eight members before the 2027 annual meeting.

The board also resolved on April 16, 2026 to seek shareholder approval at the 2026 annual meeting to declassify its board structure and phase in annual director elections, a move positioned as strengthening governance, oversight and shareholder engagement. The agreement formalizes a more collaborative relationship with Altai, including regular meetings on financial and strategic matters, signaling a negotiated end to a potential proxy contest and reinforcing OraSure’s broader multi-year transformation and value-creation strategy.

The most recent analyst rating on (OSUR) stock is a Hold with a $3.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Orasure Technologies stock, see the OSUR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on OSUR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, OSUR is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weakened financial performance (losses, steep revenue decline, and renewed cash burn). The latest earnings call provides some offset via strong cash/no-debt positioning and credible product/regulatory catalysts, while technicals are neutral and valuation remains challenged due to negative earnings and no dividend support.

To see Spark’s full report on OSUR stock, click here.

More about Orasure Technologies

OraSure Technologies, Inc., listed on Nasdaq as OSUR, is a healthcare diagnostics company specializing in point-of-need and home diagnostic tests and sample management solutions. Through subsidiaries including DNA Genotek, Sherlock Biosciences and BioMedomics, it develops, manufactures and distributes rapid diagnostic tests and sample collection and stabilization devices sold globally to clinical, public health, research, government, pharmaceutical and direct-to-consumer markets.

The company focuses on decentralizing diagnostics to connect people to healthcare wherever they are, aiming to improve access, quality and value of care through effortless testing and sample management innovations. Its products target the discovery and detection of critical medical conditions and are used by clinical laboratories, hospitals, physicians’ offices and community organizations worldwide.

Average Trading Volume: 493,105

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $224M

Find detailed analytics on OSUR stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Canal+ ( (GB:CAN) ) has shared an announcement.

Canal+ has strengthened its top management structure by appointing David Mignot, CEO of Canal+ Africa and CEO of MultiChoice, and Christophe Pinard-Legry, CEO of Europe and France in charge of business, to its Management Board with effect from 16 April 2026, chaired by Maxime Saada. Gérald-Brice Viret, CEO of Canal+ France in charge of programmes and channels, will serve as a permanent invitee, a move that consolidates leadership around key regional and content operations following the integration of MultiChoice and reinforces governance across its European and African markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:CAN) stock is a Hold with a £225.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Canal+ stock, see the GB:CAN Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CAN is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak technicals (price below all key moving averages with negative MACD) and loss-making profitability (negative P/E and net losses). Offsetting these, cash flow improved materially in 2025 and leverage is better than earlier years, but higher 2025 debt and margin pressure keep the risk profile elevated.

To see Spark’s full report on CAN stock, click here.

More about Canal+

Canal+ is a global media and entertainment company with leading positions in Europe and Africa, operating across the entire audiovisual value chain from production to broadcast, distribution and aggregation. It serves over 40 million subscribers in more than 70 countries, offering pay-TV, streaming, films, live sport and TV series, and owns assets such as MultiChoice Group, STUDIOCANAL, Dailymotion and various telecom operations, alongside minority stakes in Viaplay, Viu and UGC.

data.title: Sichuan Kelun-Biotech Completes H Share Full Circulation Conversion
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Sichuan Kelun-Biotech Biopharmaceutical Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:6990) ) has issued an update.

Sichuan Kelun-Biotech Biopharmaceutical Co., Ltd. has completed the full circulation conversion of 8,214,278 domestic and unlisted foreign shares into H shares, representing about 3.52% of its total share capital. The converted H shares will begin trading on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange on April 20, 2026, involving three participating shareholders, including Wealthy Linkage Limited, Future Industry Investment Fund Phase II and Leyue Capital Limited, thereby modestly increasing the company’s freely tradable H share float and enhancing its market liquidity.

This move is expected to strengthen the company’s presence in Hong Kong’s capital market by expanding the portion of shares available to international investors. The completion of the H share full circulation marks a further step in aligning the company’s share structure with market practices for cross-border listed Chinese biopharmaceutical firms, which may improve trading efficiency and broaden its investor base over time.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:6990) stock is a Buy with a HK$526.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sichuan Kelun-Biotech Biopharmaceutical Co., Ltd. Class H stock, see the HK:6990 Stock Forecast page.

More about Sichuan Kelun-Biotech Biopharmaceutical Co., Ltd. Class H

Sichuan Kelun-Biotech Biopharmaceutical Co., Ltd. is a Hong Kong-listed biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing innovative drug products. The company operates in China’s healthcare and life sciences sector, with its H shares traded on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, giving it access to international capital markets.

data.title: PMGC Holdings Secures $40 Million Equity Purchase Facility
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

PMGC Holdings ( (ELAB) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 16, 2026, PMGC Holdings Inc. entered into a securities purchase agreement with an institutional investor establishing a $40 million equity purchase facility structured as pre-paid share purchases. An initial tranche of about $10 million, carrying an original issue discount and associated costs, was scheduled to close around April 17, 2026, providing net proceeds of roughly $9.7 million and giving the investor certain participation rights in future financings and a secured, first-priority claim on subsidiary equity.

The 24‑month facility, which runs through April 16, 2028, allows PMGC to draw additional capital at its discretion, subject to caps, pricing floors tied to Nasdaq rules, and weekly sale limitations on the investor’s share disposals. Backed by guarantees from PMGC’s operating subsidiaries and a pledge of their equity, the arrangement gives the company flexible, committed funding to accelerate its roll-up of U.S. precision manufacturing assets in aerospace, defense, and industrial markets, supporting further acquisitions and operational investments while diluting existing shareholders through new stock issuance.

The company also committed to reserve additional shares, secure stockholder approval for issuances above Nasdaq’s 19.99% cap, and maintain covenants that favor the investor in future variable-rate transactions. For stakeholders, the facility strengthens PMGC’s acquisition firepower and balance-sheet flexibility but concentrates security interests over key assets with the investor and embeds participation and consent rights that could influence the structure and terms of future financings.

Spark’s Take on ELAB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ELAB is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (volatile revenue, large operating losses, and sustained cash burn). Technicals also remain bearish (below key moving averages with negative MACD). Corporate events provide some offset via strategic expansion and contracts/compliance wins, but financing-related risk and the lack of profitability keep the overall score low.

To see Spark’s full report on ELAB stock, click here.

More about PMGC Holdings

PMGC Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: ELAB) is a diversified holding company executing a targeted roll-up strategy in U.S.-based precision manufacturing, with a current focus on acquiring aerospace, defense, and industrial manufacturing businesses. Its portfolio includes ITAR-registered, AS9100D-certified precision CNC machining operations and a specialty IT hardware packaging company serving data center and AI infrastructure markets.

The company aims to build a scaled, vertically integrated precision manufacturing platform serving mission-critical supply chains across defense, aerospace, and next-generation infrastructure. PMGC seeks growth through acquisitions, operational integration, and investments in automation, workforce development, and advanced manufacturing capabilities, while also opportunistically buying cash-generative businesses outside its core aerospace and defense focus when returns are attractive.

Average Trading Volume: 7,297,876

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $8.13M

See more insights into ELAB stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

ACM Research ( (ACMR) ) has shared an announcement.

On April 17, 2026, ACM Research (Shanghai), Inc. announced that it is proposing to issue overseas listed H shares and apply for a secondary listing on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. The move is aimed at strengthening its capital base, enhancing overall competitiveness, attracting and retaining talent, and consolidating its position in international markets.

As of the announcement date, ACM Shanghai was still in discussions with intermediaries and key details had not been finalized, and the proposed listing will not change its controlling shareholder or actual controller. The plan remains subject to approval by the company’s board and shareholders, as well as review and clearance from Chinese and Hong Kong regulatory authorities, and the company cautioned that there is significant uncertainty over whether the listing will ultimately proceed.

The most recent analyst rating on (ACMR) stock is a Buy with a $70.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on ACM Research stock, see the ACMR Stock Forecast page.

The score is supported by strong growth guidance and a solid balance sheet/liquidity position, but held back by weak technical trends and the fundamental risk of inconsistent cash generation alongside recent margin compression. Valuation is acceptable but not cheap, so a higher score likely requires clearer margin recovery and more consistent cash conversion.

ANIMA Holding S.p.A. ( (IT:ANIM) ) has provided an announcement.

ANIMA Holding’s newly appointed Board of Directors, chaired by Patrizia Grieco, held its first meeting following the April 15 shareholders’ meeting and confirmed its top leadership structure. The Board named Marcello Priori as Vice President and renewed Saverio Perissinotto’s mandate as Chief Executive Officer for the 2026–2028 term, while completing regulatory checks on directors and auditors’ requirements, with independence assessments to follow.

The leadership continuity with Perissinotto and the appointment of Priori are set to provide stability to ANIMA’s governance at the start of the new three-year cycle. This configuration underpins the company’s strategic direction in asset management and signals to investors and stakeholders a predictable management framework as regulatory compliance reviews are finalized.

Guangzhou Automobile Group Co ( (HK:2238) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Guangzhou Automobile Group Co. has scheduled a board meeting for 29 April 2026 to review and approve its unaudited first-quarter results for the period ended 31 March 2026, prepared under PRC Generally Accepted Accounting Principles. The announcement signals the upcoming disclosure of the group’s early 2026 operating performance, a key data point for investors tracking the company’s financial health and market trajectory.

The board, led by chairman Feng Xingya and comprising executive, non-executive and independent non-executive directors, will consider these figures among other matters at the meeting. The planned review underscores the company’s adherence to regular financial reporting obligations in Hong Kong and provides a timetable for stakeholders awaiting insight into the automaker’s quarterly results.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2238) stock is a Buy with a HK$4.20 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Guangzhou Automobile Group Co stock, see the HK:2238 Stock Forecast page.

Guangzhou Automobile Group Co., Ltd. is a Chinese automotive manufacturer based in Guangzhou, focusing on the production and sale of vehicles and related automotive services.
